name: Aesthetics Office
tagline: Physician-overseen, nurse-led aesthetics in the heart of Sonoma County.
seoDescription: Aesthetics Office is a Santa Rosa medical spa led by Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN, with physician oversight by Dr

sections.heading: Nurse-led medical aesthetics in Larkfield
sections.subheading: A Santa Rosa clinic led by Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN, with physician oversight by Dr. Adrian de la Torre — personalized injectables, laser, and wellness in the heart of Sonoma County.
badges: Led by Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN
Treatments overseen by Dr. Adrian de la Torre

sections.heading: Personalized aesthetics, close to home
body: Aesthetics Office sits in the heart of Sonoma County at Larkfield Center in Santa Rosa, where Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN, and her specially trained team deliver cosmetic and wellness treatments under the oversight of Dr. Adrian de la Torre.

The practice pairs medical expertise with a personal, unhurried approach — taking time to understand each client's goals before recommending a plan. From injectables and laser therapies to body contouring, IV therapy, and hair regrowth, treatments are tailored to the individual rather than pulled from a fixed menu.
highlights: Licensed, RN-led medical aesthetics clinic with physician oversight
Led by Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN
Treatments overseen by Dr. Adrian de la Torre
Full menu of injectables, laser, body contouring & wellness

items.title: Injectables — BOTOX, Dysport & Fillers
items.description: Neuromodulators and dermal fillers placed with a light, natural hand to soften lines and restore facial balance.

items.title: Laser Therapies
items.description: Laser hair removal, tattoo removal, and skin-tightening treatments matched to your skin and goals.

items.title: Body Contouring
items.description: Non-surgical contouring to smooth, tighten, and refine targeted areas.

items.title: Anti-Aging & Skin Rejuvenation
items.description: Resurfacing and rejuvenation treatments that improve tone, texture, and firmness over time.

items.title: IV Therapy & Wellness
items.description: IV hydration, red-light therapy, and wellness treatments that support how you feel as well as how you look.

items.title: Hair Regrowth
items.description: Non-surgical treatments that support thicker, fuller hair.

items.title: Licensed, RN-Led Medical Aesthetics Clinic
items.body: Properly credentialed, so the work is covered and done to standard.

items.title: Led By Aesthetic Nurse Specialist Nancie Fox, RN
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.
